mapper.select:
SELECT s.stock_seq as stockSeq, s.store_seq as storeSeq, s.stock_name as stockName, s.category, s.unit, s.safety_stock as safetyStock, s.default_expiry_days as defaultExpiryDays, s.current_stock as currentStock, s.created_at as createdAt, s.updated_at as updatedAt, (SELECT MIN(DATEDIFF(expiration_date, CURRENT_DATE())) FROM stock_batches WHERE stock_seq = s.stock_seq AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_quantity > 0 AND expiration_date >= CURRENT_DATE()) as daysUntilExpiry, (SELECT MIN(DATEDIFF(expiration_date, CURRENT_DATE())) FROM stock_batches WHERE stock_seq = s.stock_seq AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_quantity > 0) as remainedDays FROM stocks s
AND s.store_seq = ( CASE WHEN #{storeSeq} IS NOT NULL AND #{storeSeq} != 0 THEN #{storeSeq} ELSE (SELECT store_seq FROM stores WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY store_seq ASC LIMIT 1) END )
AND s.stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
AND s.category = #{category}
AND s.current_stock <= s.safety_stock AND s.current_stock > 0
AND s.current_stock = 0
AND s.current_stock > s.safety_stock
AND s.stock_seq IN ( SELECT DISTINCT stock_seq FROM stock_batches WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_quantity > 0 AND DATEDIFF(expiration_date, CURRENT_DATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 7 )
ORDER BY s.stock_seq DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stocks (store_seq, stock_name, category, unit, safety_stock, default_expiry_days, current_stock) VALUES (#{storeSeq}, #{stockName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{safetyStock}, #{defaultExpiryDays}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT stock_seq as stockSeq, store_seq as storeSeq, stock_name as stockName, category, unit, safety_stock as safetyStock, default_expiry_days as defaultExpiryDays, current_stock as currentStock, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM stocks WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET current_stock = current_stock + #{changeQuantity}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_batches ( stock_seq, store_seq, lot_number, detail_stock_name, initial_quantity, current_quantity, incoming_price, expiration_date, incoming_date ) VALUES ( #{stockSeq}, #{storeSeq}, #{lotNumber}, #{detailStockName}, #{initialQuantity}, #{currentQuantity}, #{incomingPrice}, #{expirationDate}, CURRENT_DATE )
mapper.select: SELECT batch_seq as batchSeq, stock_seq as stockSeq, store_seq as storeSeq, lot_number as lotNumber, detail_stock_name as detailStockName, initial_quantity as initialQuantity, current_quantity as currentQuantity, incoming_price as incomingPrice, expiration_date as expirationDate, incoming_date as incomingDate FROM stock_batches WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND current_quantity > 0 ORDER BY expiration_date ASC, batch_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_history ( stock_seq, store_seq, batch_seq, transaction_type, change_quantity, current_total_stock, detail_stock_name, price, expiration_date, reason, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{stockSeq}, #{storeSeq}, #{batchSeq}, #{transactionType}, #{changeQuantity}, #{currentTotalStock}, #{detailStockName}, #{price}, #{expirationDate}, #{reason}, #{memo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT batch_seq as batchSeq, stock_seq as stockSeq, store_seq as storeSeq, lot_number as lotNumber, detail_stock_name as detailStockName, initial_quantity as initialQuantity, current_quantity as currentQuantity, incoming_price as incomingPrice, expiration_date as expirationDate, incoming_date as incomingDate FROM stock_batches WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} ORDER BY expiration_date ASC

SELECT history_seq as historySeq, stock_seq as stockSeq, store_seq as storeSeq, batch_seq as batchSeq, transaction_type as transactionType, change_quantity as changeQuantity, current_total_stock as currentTotalStock, detail_stock_name as detailStockName, price, expiration_date as expirationDate, reason, memo, created_at as createdAt FROM stock_history WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET stock_name = #{stockName}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, safety_stock = #{safetyStock}, default_expiry_days = #{defaultExpiryDays}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stocks WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
DELETE FROM stock_batches WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
DELETE FROM stock_history WHERE stock_seq = #{stockSeq} AND store_seq = #{storeSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_batches WHERE current_quantity > 0 AND store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND expiration_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT batch_seq as batchSeq, stock_seq as stockSeq, store_seq as storeSeq, lot_number as lotNumber, detail_stock_name as detailStockName, initial_quantity as initialQuantity, current_quantity as currentQuantity, incoming_price as incomingPrice, expiration_date as expirationDate, incoming_date as incomingDate FROM stock_batches WHERE current_quantity > 0 AND expiration_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY expiration_date ASC
